claimText: Seneca Foods (SENEA) trades below tangible book value on a FIFO-adjusted basis.
notes: Aggregator-derived FIFO-adjusted equity ~$902.8m before goodwill/intangible deductions; goodwill/intangibles not retrieved from filing; aggregator share counts mutually inconsistent (CE-01).

claimText: Seneca trades at or below net current asset value (NCAV) when inventory is restated to FIFO.
notes: Reported NCAV ~$207m; FIFO-adjusted NCAV ~$566m gross / ~$477m net of 24.9% deferred tax; primary share-count and per-class market price not reconciled.

claimText: Seneca's reported earnings materially understate FIFO earnings power because of a $359.3m LIFO reserve.
notes: LIFO reserve magnitude (C-003a) supported high; FIFO earnings power (C-003b) unresolved low; reconciliation table not retrieved (Q-005).

claimText: Seneca has compounded book value per share over a 20-year window despite minimal sell-side coverage.
notes: GuruFocus tabulation gives BVPS $77.16 Dec 2022 with 10y avg 7.40% and 5y 10.90%; full FY2005-FY2025 series not rebuilt.

claimText: U.S. private-label vegetable canning is an oligopoly in which Seneca and Lakeside Foods account for ~90% of supply.
notes: Q-001 (which competitor Lakeside names) and Q-IS-A (national vs regional vs category-narrow basis) are blocking; Lakeside primary material not retrieved.

claimText: Del Monte Pacific deconsolidated U.S. Del Monte Foods effective May 2025 and the U.S. business filed Chapter 11.
notes: DMC-07 and DMC-08 supported_by_anchor in pack but underlying filings/dockets not quoted into repo; DMC-01..DMC-06 conduct sequence has no source ID and is unresolved.

claimText: SENEA was deleted from the S&P SmallCap 600 in July 2023, producing forced selling pressure independent of fundamentals.
notes: Confidence is in the unresolved verdict itself; OHLCV/ETF holdings/factor returns not collected; Decision Gate 4 unmet.

claimText: Seneca has executed material share repurchases relative to float, supporting per-share compounding.
notes: March 2021 modified Dutch auction (~17.07% of relevant float at $51.62) corroborated by issuer press releases; full FY2005-FY2025 buyback ledger and 10-K Item 5 monthly issuer-purchase table not retrieved.

claimText: Seneca has minimal sell-side analyst coverage, contributing to the discount.
notes: S-006 (IR coverage page + consensus-estimate vendor) not retrieved.

claimText: Seneca operates a dual-class share structure with concentrated insider/family voting control.
notes: Q-006 explicitly flags family voting concentration as unverified; FY2025 DEF 14A and 10-K not retrieved.

claimText: Seneca has demonstrated pricing-cost recovery across crop, steel/tinplate, freight, and labor cycles.
notes: Not part of this round of parallel claim tests; preserved as not-tested rather than rolled into a synthesis judgment.
